newspaper: Unknown (likely a Rio de Janeiro newspaper based on coverage of the Câmara Federal)
original_snippet_context: Report on the Câmara Federal's Finance Committee meeting and their review of amendments to the Caixa de Conversão project.
relevant_quote: A Commissão de Finanças da Câmara Federal, reunida ante-hon- tem, assignou o parecer do sr. David Campista, sobre as emendas offerecidas ao projecto da Caixa de Conversão.
justification: This excerpt simply reports on the committee's activities related to the Caixa de Conversão project without expressing any particular viewpoint on the monetary policy itself.
